sequence_goal: condense the source message into a coherent spoken remake with stable visual continuity

shots.narration: 这两年做生意的人，最明显的感受就是累，不只是难，而且越来越卷。
shots.visual_goal: introduce the speaker and lock the base location
shots.continuity_anchor: same woman, same cardigan, same office corner, afternoon light, calm direct-to-camera delivery
shots.current_visual_state: woman seated at desk, looking into camera, laptop half-open on table
shots.next_visual_state: lean slightly forward as she shifts from opening to analysis
shots.image_prompt_addendum: direct to camera, natural posture, realistic office details
shots.video_prompt_addendum: subtle breathing, natural blink, slight shoulder shift

shots.narration: 很多人看起来还在忙，其实不是在增长，而是在被环境推着走。
shots.visual_goal: keep the same space while increasing urgency
shots.continuity_anchor: same woman, same desk, same daylight, only posture and framing advance
shots.prev_visual_state: woman seated at desk, laptop half-open on table
